reach_why: Mostly synthesizes familiar concerns about evaluator alignment, proxy failure, and representational limits rather than opening new territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links lexical novelty skepticism, recursive evaluation instability, and schema compression into one critique.
falsifiable_why: Testable by comparing compressed self-improving systems against richer representations and independent evaluators on explanatory tasks.
explanation: Apparent self-improving explanation can be illusory when proxies, judges, and representations are unreliable.
